task: View the most recent job posting for a full-time pharmacy position in the US.
graderReasoning: The agent searched Amazon Jobs for 'pharmacy' in 'United States', sorted results by 'Most recent', applied the 'Full Time' filter, and verified the results page URL included sort=recent and job_type[]=Full-Time. The top visible result after filtering/sorting was 'Certified Pharmacy Technician, Amazon Pharmacy' in Fort Myers, FL, Job ID 10419245, posted May 13, 2026. The agent then opened that exact job detail page, confirming the title and URL. This satisfies viewing the most recent full-time pharmacy job posting in the US.
final_result_response:
Viewed the most recent full-time US pharmacy posting on Amazon Jobs:

**Certified Pharmacy Technician, Amazon Pharmacy**  
**Job ID:** 10419245  
**Location:** Fort Myers, FL, USA  
**Posted:** May 13, 2026  
**Pay:** $22.00 to $24.00/hour  
**Link:** https://www.amazon.jobs/en/jobs/10419245/certified-pharmacy-technician-amazon-pharmacy
action_history: Opening Amazon Jobs: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.amazon.jobs/');
Searching full-time pharmacy jobs in US: await page.locator('e47').click().catch(()=>{});
Searching full-time pharmacy jobs in US: await page.locator('e6').fill('pharmacy');
Searching full-time pharmacy jobs in US: await page.locator('e7').fill('United States');
Searching full-time pharmacy jobs in US: await page.locator('e8').click();
Sorting by most recent: await page.locator('e323').click();
Opening the most recent posting: await page.locator('e326').click();
Reopening most recent job posting: await page.locator('e149').click();
